name: Yaki Udon (Figi)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken breast or firm tofu, diced
1 cup Green bell pepper, thinly sliced
2 cups Zucchini and yellow squash, mixed
1 tbsp Oyster sauce or to taste, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large saute pan and add the oil. When the oil is heated, add the diced chicken or tofu and stir fry until lightly golden.
2. Add the remaining vegetables (green cabbage, carrot, onion, green bell pepper, zucchini, yellow squash) and continue stir frying until they are lightly cooked. Do not overcook the vegetables.
3. Add the broccoli spears and cook for a few more seconds.
4. Add the udon noodles and oyster sauce (if using). Stir fry until the noodles are heated through and cooked. The noodles do not need to be cooked separately as the juices from the vegetables provide moisture.
5. Season to taste with salt, pepper, or additional oyster sauce if desired.
